description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: one to check code formatting in an ubuntu-latest container using openrct2/openrct2-build:0.2.4-format, and another on windows-latest to build OpenRCT2, create artefacts, and upload them. Environment variables OPENLOCO_BUILD_SERVER and OPENLOCO_VERSION should be set to GitHub and 20.05.1 respectively.
